title: Who Am I?
content:
Hi! I'm Nazmi Yücel Çan. I built this space to share my journey, projects, and insights in data science, machine learning, and deep learning. I want to showcase what I'm working on, break down complex topics simply, and connect with fellow tech enthusiasts.

I'm always exploring new areas in AI, with a strong focus on neural networks, NLP, and data analysis. When I'm not coding, you can find me experimenting with new algorithms, contributing to open-source, or diving into AI ethics.
